Saturday, July 4.description: Join us for a special evening under the stars this 4th of July on the North Lawn. Bring a picnic, a few chairs, and your favorite people for a relaxed and festive night. As the evening winds down, enjoy a great view of the Las Vegas Strip fireworks—always a highlight of the celebration. We hope to see you there! (Reference: image_dbae8b.png)
